title: Unknown Host
description: Unknown Host is a psychological horror Minecraft mod that slowly transforms a normal world into a nightmare.
body:
## Unknown Host
Unknown Host is a psychological horror Minecraft mod that slowly transforms a normal world into a nightmare.


##  IMPORTANT WARNING
Mod is fully capable of:

Closing or crashing your game (simulating crashes / server disconnects)

Minimizing Minecraft to your desktop

Opening system message windows (Windows error boxes)

Minimizing Minecraft to your desktop

The mod will kick you from the world.

The mod will break your world.

All of these features are 100% safe simulations code-wise and are strictly part of the lore. No actual files on your computer will be deleted or harmed.

The mod is partially inspired by [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)

## Credits:

Recommended resource pack : [Beta Continuum](https://github.com/shmoobalizer/Beta_Continuum/releases/tag/1.20.1_1.1)

Dependency on the resource pack specified above: [Programmer Art](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-plus/version/v2.5.0)

Additional resource pack: [Old sounds default version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/old-sounds/files/4595826)
